# DBRepo

> DBRepo is a repository software for relational databases. This static site is built with
> Zensical and deployed via mike to GitHub Pages. Versioned docs live under /latest/.

## Docs

- [Get Started](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DBRepo-Project/dbrepo-docs/main/docs/get-started.md): Welcome, why use DBRepo, and help
- [User Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DBRepo-Project/dbrepo-docs/main/docs/user-guide/quickstart.md): Quickstart and account/database/data management
- [API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DBRepo-Project/dbrepo-docs/main/docs/api/index.md): REST, Python, broker, OAI-PMH, JSON-LD, FAIR Signposting APIs
- [Maintainer Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DBRepo-Project/dbrepo-docs/main/docs/maintainer-guide/index.md): Configuration, deployments (Kubernetes/Docker/VM), backup/restore, troubleshooting

## Optional

- [OpenAPI spec (frozen)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DBRepo-Project/dbrepo-docs/main/docs/.openapi/api.yaml): REST API contract (~8500 lines)
